title: stanleya pinnata var. bipinnata
intro: Stanleya pinnata var. bipinnata, also known as prickly phacelia, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae) and is native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Stanleya pinnata var. bipinnata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity, which may help to prevent infections. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
